entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: An important crop used for alleviating micronutrient malnutrition through breeding programs.

entities.name: MICRONUTRIENT MALNUTRITION
entities.description: A health condition that can be alleviated by increasing micronutrient content in staple crops.

entities.name: GENOMICS-ASSISTED BREEDING
entities.description: A breeding approach using genomic tools to improve specific traits in crops.

entities.name: GRAIN IRON CONTENT
entities.description: The concentration of iron in the grain of pearl millet, referred to as GFeC.

entities.name: GRAIN ZINC CONTENT
entities.description: The concentration of zinc in the grain of pearl millet, referred to as GZnC.

entities.name: GENE EXPRESSION ANALYSIS
entities.description: A method used to identify candidate genes by studying their expression patterns across different tissues and stages.

entities.name: QTL REGIONS
entities.description: Quantitative Trait Loci regions associated with specific phenotypic traits.

entities.name: PGLZIP
entities.description: A gene family identified as a candidate for grain iron and zinc content.

entities.name: PGLNRAMP
entities.description: A gene family identified as a candidate for grain iron and zinc content.

entities.name: PGLFER
entities.description: A gene family identified as a candidate for grain iron and zinc content.

entities.name: PGLFER1
entities.description: A ferritin-like gene identified as a potential candidate gene for grain iron content.

entities.name: IRON DEFICIENCY
entities.description: A nutrient deficiency state that influences promoter elements of metabolism genes.

entities.name: ZINC DEFICIENCY
entities.description: A nutrient deficiency state that influences promoter elements of metabolism genes.

entities.name: HORMONE
entities.description: Regulatory elements found in the promoter analysis of candidate genes.

entities.name: METAL-RESPONSIVE ELEMENTS
entities.description: Regulatory elements in the promoter that respond to metal concentrations.

entities.name: SALT-REGULATED ELEMENTS
entities.description: Regulatory elements in the promoter that respond to salt stress.

entities.name: LINKAGE GROUP 7
entities.description: A specific genomic region containing major QTLs for grain iron and zinc content.

entities.name: MOLECULAR BREEDING PROGRAMS
entities.description: Programs that utilize molecular markers and candidate genes to improve crop traits globally.
